title: Refactor frontend to service-layer architecture
description: Replace raw fetch calls with proper service layer: API client (src/lib/client.ts), domain services (src/lib/services/visits.ts, src/lib/services/agent.ts), WebSocket singleton service (src/lib/ws.ts). Components import services, never call fetch directly.
close_reason: Service layer implemented: client.ts, services/visits.ts + agent.ts, ws.ts. All components refactored to use services.

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: src/lib/client.ts (base HTTP client) -> src/lib/services/visits.ts + agent.ts (typed domain services) -> components. src/lib/ws.ts (WebSocket singleton) -> hooks/useWebSocket.ts -> components. No raw fetch calls in components.

title: Create API endpoint for creating a new visit
description: Add POST /api/visits endpoint that accepts visit fields and creates a new DB record.
close_reason: Implemented: Hono server at src/server/hono.ts handles all API endpoints, Dockerfile.api + docker-compose api service

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: Hono replaces Next.js API routes. Hono server runs on port 3999. All API endpoints migrated from src/app/api/* to src/server/hono.ts. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/visits, GET /api/visits/:id, POST /api/agent/run, GET /api/agent/status, POST /api/agent/resolve, POST /api/seed.

title: Add pipeline phase visualization stepper
description: Add a stepper UI showing the 5 pipeline phases: Ingest -> Extract -> Plan -> Act -> Done. Highlight the current phase during a run and show progress.
close_reason: Implemented: PipelineStepper component shows 5 phases, driven by WebSocket phase events

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: PipelineStepper component shows 5 phases (Ingest/Extract/Plan/Act/Done). Driven by WebSocket phase events from agent core. Integrated into AgentRunPanel.

title: Test everything with agent-browser
description: Run agent-browser to test the full workflow: create a visit, run agent, see real-time updates, approve/reject HITL tasks, view artifacts.
close_reason: Full workflow tested with agent-browser: create visit -> run agent -> WebSocket pipeline -> HITL approval -> artifact rendering

title: Add New Visit form for data entry
description: Create a form UI to input account name, industry, subject, notes, outcomes, and owner. Creates a DB record and navigates to the visit detail page. This is the primary entry point for the demo.
close_reason: Implemented: New Visit form at /new page, creates visit via POST /api/visits, navigates to detail page

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: New Visit form at /new page. Client component calls POST /api/visits on Hono. After creation navigates to /visits/[id]. Supports account_name, industry, subject, notes, outcomes, owner fields.

title: Add WebSocket server for real-time agent updates
description: Create a WebSocket server that emits status events during agent runs (phase transitions, task completion, artifacts). Client connects to receive live updates instead of polling.
close_reason: Implemented: wsManager.ts emits events, agent core broadcasts at each phase, useWebSocket hook connects clients

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: WebSocket via ws library on Hono HTTP server (port 3999). Agent core -> wsManager.emit() -> broadcast to all WS clients. Client useWebSocket hook in AgentRunPanel.

title: Add rich artifact rendering
description: Render artifacts with type-specific views: email preview cards for email_draft, structured outline view for proposals, formatted findings for research, and approval/rejection cards for notes.
close_reason: Implemented: ArtifactViewer renders type-specific previews for emails, proposals, research, expenses, notes

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: ArtifactViewer renders type-specific previews: EmailPreview (To/Subject + body), ProposalPreview (structured outline), ResearchPreview (blue bg), NotePreview (yellow bg), ExpensePreview (green/red flag), default raw text.

title: Add dashboard stats and run history
description: Show aggregate stats on dashboard (total visits, pending approvals, completed runs). Show previous run history for each visit with status and timestamps.
close_reason: Implemented: DashboardStats component, dashboard as client component, run history in visit detail sidebar

comments.author: r3c0nc1l3r
comments.text: Architecture: DashboardStats shows 4 stat cards (total visits, completed runs, pending approvals, failed runs). Dashboard page now client component fetching from Hono API. Previous run history shown in visit detail page sidebar.

title: Add extraction review step before execution
description: After Claude returns extracted items, show them in a review pane before execution begins. Let the user review, edit, and approve extracted items before tasks are created.
close_reason: Superseded by HITL flow: extracted items are visible as analysis artifact + task list with pending/ready states
